title: How it all started
dek: 叩叩魔魔的故事从合肥开始，在武汉确定。Koko and Momo first met in Hefei on February 22, 2024, and officially became a couple in Wuhan on March 17, 2024.
narrative: It began in Hefei on February 22, 2024 — the first meeting.
Three weeks later in Wuhan, on March 16, they held hands for the first time. The next day, March 17, KoMo officially began.
mapCaption: 叩叩魔魔的故事从合肥开始。

title: The first year of adventures
dek: Wuhan in May, Hefei in June, Singapore, then a whole summer in Beijing.
narrative: In May 2024, KoMo returned to Wuhan. In June, they visited Hefei again, then flew to Singapore.
The summer of 2024 was spent in Beijing, from June through August.
mapCaption: KoMo's first year of travels together.

evidenceProfile.strength: 4 trips across China and Southeast Asia

title: Beijing, again and again
dek: Two Beijing stays in 2025 — March, then May through August.
narrative: In March 2025, KoMo was back in Beijing.
From May to August 2025, another extended summer in Beijing.

title: Momo comes to Koko
dek: 魔魔去美国看叩叩。In February 2026, Momo traveled to the US to visit Koko.
narrative: February 2026: Momo flew to the US to visit Koko — the first time together on Koko's side of the world.
After the visit, Momo returned to Beijing.
proofPoints: Momo visits Koko in the US: February 2026.
